rawAssistant: Whispers of a fresh road leading north have been circulating, speaking of an old keepsake hidden away in the hollows. Some claim it's tied to the lowland glow, though I've yet to see any concrete evidence. The east wind has indeed brought soot, and folks are warning their children to stay close to home – seems like a good idea, if you ask me.
